allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem F:\\bloomtrack -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not \(Test-Path F:\\bloomtrack\)\) { Write-Output "DIR_MISSING" })

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "npm.cmd" -ArgumentList "run","start" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "F:\\bloomtrack\\server.log" -RedirectStandardError "F:\\bloomtrack\\server.err" -WorkingDirectory "F:\\bloomtrack" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { node F:\\bloomtrack\\data\\test-import.mjs } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $_" }; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
